cards.back: The process of assigning importance or relevance to a document in a search result set
A data structure used in Information Retrieval Systems to store the location of terms in the index
A technique used to expand the scope of a query by adding relevant terms not present in the user's query
A mathematical model used to represent documents as vectors and calculate similarity between them
A technique used to weight the importance of terms in a document based on their frequency and rarity in the entire corpus
